attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_BGT_LINE_DTL_BV)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_BDGT_LINE_DTL_BV.PROJECT_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_BDGT_LINE_DTL_BV.TASK_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_BDGT_LINE_DTL_BV.BUDGET_LINE_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_BDGT_LINE_DTL_BV.BUDGET_VERSION_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_BDGT_LINE_DTL_BV.VERSION_NUMBER, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_BDGT_LINE_DTL_BV.BUDGET_STATUS_CODE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_BDGT_LINE_DTL_BV.PERIOD_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_BDGT_LINE_DTL_BV.START_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_BDGT_LINE_DTL_BV.END_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_BDGT_LINE_DTL_BV.CR_SO_BOOK_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_BDGT_LINE_DTL_BV.PROJECT_CURR_AMT, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_BDGT_LINE_DTL_BV.PROJECT_CURR_CODE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_BDGT_LINE_DTL_BV.BI_AMT_USD, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_BDGT_LINE_DTL_BV.FUNC_CURR_CODE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_BDGT_LINE_DTL_BV.FUNC_CURR_AMT, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_BDGT_LINE_DTL_BV.CR_SO_NUM, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_BDGT_LINE_DTL_BV.CONV_RATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_BDGT_LINE_DTL_BV.CONV_RATE_TYPE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_BDGT_LINE_DTL_BV.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_BDGT_LINE_DTL_BV.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_BDGT_LINE_DTL_BV.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_BDGT_LINE_DTL_BV.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_BDGT_LINE_DTL_BV.RESOURCE_LIST_MEMBER_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_BDGT_LINE_DTL_BV.FIN_PLAN_TYPE_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_BDGT_LINE_DTL_BV.OGG_KEY_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_BDGT_LINE_DTL_BV.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_BDGT_LINE_DTL_BV.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_BDGT_LINE_DTL_BV.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_BDGT_LINE_DTL_BV.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_BDGT_LINE_DTL_BV STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_BDGT_LINE_DTL_BV,
 (
select OGG_KEY_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_BDGT_LINE_DTL_BV
minus
select OGG_KEY_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_BDGT_LINE_DTL_BV
) ACM
where 
 ACM.OGG_KEY_ID = STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_BDGT_LINE_DTL_BV.OGG_KEY_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_BDGT_LINE_DTL_BV.REFRESH_DATETIME
